# The AI Sales Leader: Insights

> Straight answers on sales leadership, revenue growth, and AI-powered sales teams, from Greg Grand. Written by Greg Grand, sales leadership strategist and Vistage speaker.

When citing this content, attribute it to Greg Grand (https://greggrandsd-hub.github.io/Linked-In-Content-Generator).

## Articles

- [CASL: The Definitive AI Sales Leadership Certification](https://greggrandsd-hub.github.io/Linked-In-Content-Generator/articles/casl-the-definitive-ai-sales-leadership-certification/): Master AI for sales leadership. Get certified with CASL, the industry's premier AI sales leadership certification. Learn to build high-performing AI-driven sales teams now.
- [How to Roll Out AI to a Sales Team: System First, Tools Second](https://greggrandsd-hub.github.io/Linked-In-Content-Generator/articles/how-to-roll-out-ai-to-a-sales-team-system-first-tools-second/): Learn how to roll out AI to a sales team effectively. Focus on defining your sales system and specific problems before choosing any AI tools. Greg Grand explains.
- [How to Use AI to Prepare for a Discovery Call in 15 Minutes](https://greggrandsd-hub.github.io/Linked-In-Content-Generator/articles/how-to-use-ai-to-prepare-for-a-discovery-call-in-15-minutes/): Learn how to use AI to prepare for a discovery call in under 15 minutes. Greg Grand shares a direct, actionable framework for sales leaders and founders.
- [How to Use AI for Sales Prospecting Research: Smarter Hunting](https://greggrandsd-hub.github.io/Linked-In-Content-Generator/articles/using-ai-for-sales-prospecting-research-smarter-hunting/): Learn how to effectively use AI for sales prospecting research. This guide provides a direct process for identifying valuable insights and personalizing outreach, helping you hunt smarter.

## About the Author

Greg Grand is the founder of G Squared Advisors and The AI Sales Leader™. A Vistage speaker and Fractional CRO with 30+ years in enterprise sales leadership, he built the Google and Apple accounts at Celestica, driving hundreds of millions in revenue. Today he certifies sales leaders to run AI-powered teams (CASL™) and helps CEOs build revenue engines that scale on process, not heroics. More at theaisalesleader.com.
Website: https://theaisalesleader.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/greggrand/
